nasb.text: For I will be merciful to their iniquities, And I will remember their sins no more.”

esv.text: For I will be merciful toward their iniquities, and I will remember their sins no more.”

cnv.text: 我也要寬恕他們的不義， 決不再記著他們的罪惡。’”

ccb.text: 我要赦免他们的过犯， 忘掉他们的罪恶。”

csbs.text: 又因为我要宽恕他们的不义， 绝不再想起他们的罪孽    。”
